scenes.text: I used to sit on the bathroom floor and watch my mom get ready for work.
scenes.image_prompt: A small child sitting cross-legged on a bathroom floor looking up, early morning light through a frosted window, a woman's legs visible standing at the mirror, warm tones, intimate domestic moment, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: She would put on mascara with her mouth open, and I thought that was the funniest thing in the world.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a woman applying mascara in a bathroom mirror, mouth slightly open, soft warm morning light, child's reflection barely visible in the corner of the mirror, nostalgic, cinematic shallow depth of field

scenes.text: The sound of her heels clicking down the hallway meant the day was starting.
scenes.image_prompt: Low angle shot of a woman's heels walking down a narrow apartment hallway, early morning golden light from a doorway, motion blur, cinematic mood, warm color grading, 4k

scenes.text: I didn't know back then that she was exhausted, that she had been up since four, that she was doing all of it alone.
scenes.image_prompt: A tired young mother leaning against a kitchen counter holding a coffee mug, eyes closed for a moment, pre-dawn blue light through window, raw and emotional, cinematic portrait, 4k

scenes.text: I just thought she was the most beautiful person alive. I still do.
scenes.image_prompt: A woman walking out the front door into morning sunlight, seen from behind through the doorframe, small child's hand waving from inside, golden hour glow, deeply emotional, cinematic, 4k
